testcase.name: Successful user registration

testcase.name: Failed registration due to already registered email

failure.message: Expected: a string containing "El correo ya está registrado" but: was "✕ El correo ya esta registrado"

testcase.failure: Expected: a string containing "El correo ya está registrado" but: was "✕ El correo ya esta registrado"

testcase.name: Failed registration due to invalid password
Failed registration due to empty fields
